name: Easy Cheesy Salsa Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cheese spread, Pace Thick & Chunky Salsa, and sour cream in a bowl.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly incorporated.
3. Transfer the mixture to a serving bowl.
4. Top with optional toppings such as sliced green onion tops, chopped cilantro, or diced red bell peppers as desired.
5. Serve chilled with vegetable dippers or unsalted chips. Makes about 1-2/3 cups.
